title: Update Settings
description: Configure the Instagram Profile Scraper settings

content.introduction: Configure your Instagram Profile Scraper settings. You can control the maximum number of profiles collected per task and across the entire run.

rows.description: Maximum number of profiles to collect per task
Maximum number of unique results retrieved across all tasks in the entire run

proTips.content: Leave limits empty or null for unlimited collection.
Use `max_unique_results_per_run` to set a hard cap on total profiles when processing large batches.

seo.title: Update Settings - Instagram Profile Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to configure Instagram Profile Scraper settings using the Lobstr.io API.
